mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, R.* FROM ( SELECT RECIPE_ID, MEMBER_ID, TITLE, THUMBNAIL_URL, CREATED_AT FROM RECIPE ORDER BY RECIPE_ID DESC ) R WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE RN >= #{start}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN, R.* FROM ( SELECT RECIPE_ID, MEMBER_ID, TITLE, CREATED_AT FROM RECIPE WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY RECIPE_ID DESC ) R WHERE ROWNUM <= #{end} ) WHERE RN >= #{start}
mapper.insert:
SELECT RECIPE_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RECIPE ( RECIPE_ID, MEMBER_ID, TITLE, THUMBNAIL_URL ) VALUES ( #{recipeId}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{thumbnailUrl} )

INSERT ALL
INTO RECIPE_BLOCK ( BLOCK_ID, RECIPE_ID, BLOCK_TYPE, CONTENT, SORT_ORDER ) VALUES ( RECIPE_BLOCK_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{block.recipeId}, #{block.blockType}, #{block.content}, #{block.sortOrder} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select:
SELECT R.RECIPE_ID, R.MEMBER_ID, R.TITLE, R.CREATED_AT,
B.BLOCK_ID, B.BLOCK_TYPE, B.CONTENT, B.SORT_ORDER
FROM RECIPE R LEFT JOIN RECIPE_BLOCK B ON R.RECIPE_ID = B.RECIPE_ID WHERE R.RECIPE_ID = #{recipeId} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORDER
